title: sphaeranthus suaveolens
intro: Sphaeranthus suaveolens, also known as the Button Flower or White Button Bush, is a perennial plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and saponins. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Sphaeranthus suaveolens can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
